notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to second baseman Tristan Gray to first baseman Royce Lewis. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Dalton Rushing. Victor Caratini scores. Brooks Lee to 3rd. Tristan Gray to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin singles on a ground ball to right fielder Alex Call.
